10.Description:
developers will have ten days to create an experience based on the theme, when it’s announced on March 4th, 2022. Remember, you do not have to spend the full 10 days working on this - take as much or as little time as you’d like! After, there will be a short period of two weeks to allow our judging panel to select the top ten experiences! At this point, a vote will open where everyone will have the chance to vote on their favorite experiences!

After the community vote, the winning teams will have the opportunity to refine, update, and make ANY changes to their experiences that they deem necessary. These changes must be made AND published by April 12th at 11:59 PM PST.

After another week of review by our panel of judges, the top three experiences will be announced! These will be the first, second, and third place winners of the Roblox Developer Dream Jam!

gameData.title: STARSPLITTER
gameData.description:
Every instrument pointed at Saturn's rings returns corrupted data. The starfield behind the ring plane fractures into streaks, splitting the stars, as if the light is being dragged apart along axes that should not exist. From Earth, it looks like a clean tear through space itself.
Seven probes crossed the threshold. All seven went silent mid-transmission. No crash data. No signal decay. Clean telemetry, then nothing.
Scientists call it the Starsplitter. They named it before they understood how little that word would explain.
Machines do not come back. They are sending a human.

Solo-Developed by @a_mp5 for the "Roblox Developer Challenge 2026" game jam.
Guidance and secondary project contributions by game-jam team-member @penguinchest265

gameData.title: Broken Nurture [DevChallenge2026: First contact]
gameData.description:
Broken Nurture (First Contact) This game is a first-person psychological horror experience set inside a familiar home that slowly becomes oppressive over several days. Each morning begins with a phone call from the father, whose voice grows colder and more controlling, establishing a sense of constant surveillance and emotional pressure. During the day, the player performs household duties that maintain the appearance of order, while at night sleep leads to disturbing dream sequences where a long, narrowing hallway symbolizes mounting psychological stress. The game avoids jump scares and instead builds tension through atmosphere, repetition, and emotional discomfort rooted in everyday family dynamics. The experience culminates in a final confrontation with the truth behind the household and the control that defines it.

We come from Vietnam

gameData.title: [💀] Nameless
gameData.description:
i didn’t come here to hunt monsters. i came because nobody else would believe me.

in old churches across europe, they weren’t praying… they were hiding something. creatures from forgotten legends. and when people stopped saying their names, the monsters woke up.

they sent me in with nothing but a candle. no weapons, no map — just a warning: “if you forget its name, you’re already dead.”

turns out they were right.

the letters of its name are still here, scattered through the catacombs. but you only see them when you’re holding a candle. no light, no name. no name… no escape.

find the letters. remember its name. place the candle on the right altar.

just don’t let the candle die.
and don’t let it whisper your name first.

gameData.title: Plugged In [Inspire 2025]
gameData.description:
-Story-
You were working on a courier ship, usual routine, but unusual weather managed to flip over the boat. You drift above the ocean for miles, until you awaken on the shores of an abandoned island, your only possession, a questionably large power bank that comes with a reliable cable as its charger. The terrain is filled with puzzles and hazards. Navigate the island until a towering lighthouse emerges. If you can power it up and send its beam towards the sea, you might catch the attention of a passing ship… and earn your way home.

-Info-
This experience was created for the Inspire 2025 Challenge. In order to appeal to multiple DevRel communities, we added a ingame book UI with translations that explain all of the features of our power bank. Because of the diversity of our team, we managed to get translations into English, German, Romanian, French, and Spanish. All of our keybinds are also conveniently listed on the bottom left of your screen, their uses are in the Book Ui.

gameData.title: SYSTEM.EXE
gameData.description:
For the 2025 Roblox Developer Game Jam

Welcome to the world of digital chaos! In this interactive experience, you're tasked with "breaking" the system of an old computer by exploring its files, using commands, and uncovering hidden secrets. With a variety of commands at your disposal, you can cause crashes, and even "download" mysterious files that could lead to system failures. Will you find all the ways to bring the system to its knees, or will you leave it intact?


Note from the Developer:

This game was created in less than 2 days as part of my first game jam, and I did everything solo. Expect some bugs, as I had to work within a very tight timeframe. I had a lot of ideas for additional endings, but due to time constraints, I couldn't implement them all. Despite that, I really enjoyed the process and hope you have fun exploring the different ways to break the system!

gameData.title: A Close Call
Purgatorio
gameData.description:
Welcome to Purgatorio! You appear to have been deceased following your attempts to protect your family from evil spirts. While we aren’t necessarily opposed to them, we like to play a little game here… We’ll offer you the ability to temporarily return to your feeble existence and in exchange you get to protect your family for as long as you can.

During the day time we are unable to bring you back… However, you can collect clocks that contain the fabric of time itself using that nifty scythe we so kindly offered you. Up to 50 time units can be collected with this. When night falls, you will be able to be sent back and use the same scythe to send those sprits to the stratosphere.

There’s just one catch however… That scythe is the only thing keeping you in the real world, and it runs out of energy with each second that passes. Using the scythe will also take away.

We’ll see you back here when you eventually fail to protect the ones you love. Good luck!

gameData.title: abuelo
gameData.description:
Submission for the ROBLOX Inspire 2024 Challenge (https://devforum.roblox.com/t/roblox-inspire-2024-challenge/3104238).

SUMMARY:
Your character (Mort, the mushroom) is fighting for his life against a time-controlling deity known as "Abuelo." If Mort wins, he is no longer subject to the effects of passing time and can live forever in peace.

The remaining timer is your health, if it hits zero, you lose. Parrying restores some timer so you can keep the fight going.

There are four phases, each one introducing a new mechanic:
1: Simple hand attacks
2: Spinning clock face on the stage
3: Falling objects
4: Max timer of 1:00

Beating the game awards you with a badge for your efforts! Good luck everyone.

Scripting: Piptendo, Spoofify
Modeling, Animating, UI Assets: tommytherock

gameData.title: Parallel Pianist [🎉Connect 23 Winner]
gameData.description:
🎉Winner of Most Unique Game for Connect 2023🎉
Developed in 5 days

🎹 Match parallel lines on your piano to create harmonious melodies, perfect your timing, and play back your masterpiece in 'Parallel Pianist.' 

As a talented pianist, you must master the art of matching parallel lines with the keys 'A,' 'S,' 'K,' and 'L' on your piano. As the tempo increases, match lines of varying lengths. But beware of mistakes! A record scratch awaits for every wrong match. Earn points by perfecting your rhythm and timing. As you progress, the challenge intensifies, adding new keys and a faster tempo to keep you on your toes!

🎨Entry for Connect 2023 Challenge - Theme: Parallelism

gameData.title: Twisted Mansion
gameData.description:
Made in 72H
Welcome to an exciting new adventure game where your choices will determine the outcome! In this game, you play as a child who wakes up to find their parents missing and their house in disarray. To save your family, you must solve a variety of puzzles in each room, with each puzzle leading to the next and ultimately determining your fate.

Every choice you make matters in this game. Your decisions will affect the outcome of the story, leading to multiple different endings. 🤔

With challenging puzzles and a gripping storyline, this game will keep you on the edge of your seat. You'll need to use your problem-solving skills to uncover clues, solve puzzles, and make the right choices to progress through the game.

Created by a team of talented developers including Mat_Merihem as the builder and interior designer, Fun1892 as the modeler and effects scripter, and Ofc_Infinitybad as the scripter. 🎨🎧

We can't wait for you to experience the adventure and make your own choices.

gameData.title: Demon's Card [Dream Jam]
gameData.description:
Roblox Developer Dream Jam

Welcome to Demon’s Card! 

This game has been inspired by "Inscryption" and "Legends of Runeterra".


To play press the UI at the left, by pressing “Rooms” you can play with other players, by pressing the “Adventure” button you can go on an adventure in an open world.

The game makes you random cards from a set pool. To use some strong cards you will have to sacrifice others. One side is the defender while the other is the attacker, which switches at the end of every turn. After the attacker puts down their card and presses the bell, it’s the other player’s turn. 

You win by filling your own bar.

Note: Only flying cards can hit flying cards.


Credits:
    Scripters: ArawnVinheim, AraxiaVinheim
    Builders/Modelers: MaestroVinheim, blendedrival
    UI Designer: furuyaa

gameData.title: Dream Diving
gameData.description:
A puzzle platformer where you explore a massive world, complete various challenges, and in the end, wake up.

This experience is part of the 2022 Roblox Dreams Game Jam.

gameData.title: Magic Zombie Mayhem
gameData.description:
Magic Zombie Mayhem (MZM) is a 2-4 player co-op zombie survival game made in 10 days for the Roblox Developer Dream Jam 2022! Team up with your friends and try to survive the longest! 

Make it to Wave 10 for a 'flashy' surprise! 🕺 (Epilepsy warning!)

(There must be a minimum of 2 players for a game to start.)

Lead Programmer & UI Artist: ryanisawesome25
Head Modeler & Animator: Subterfuge0

gameData.title: A Day with Peculiar Buildings
gameData.description:
Welcome to 'A Day with Peculiar Buildings!'

Explore the world; All cramped in 10 days. Talk to the NPC after the bridge in your spawn to proceed!

Games Instore:
- Lazy Janitor [Find 3 Janitors] 
- Teamwork Headstack [Work with 2 other people & press all 4 buttons; Headstack needed]

Map built by: sokoism, Redekbo & HYP3RFOCUS
Scripted by: mniao
